headline: How International Paper’s New Mississippi Greenfield Packaging Plant Could Shape IP Investors’ Cost Story
summary: International Paper previously approved a US$225 million plan to build a new 468,000-square-foot sustainable packaging facility on an 80-acre site in Brandon, Mississippi, replacing its nearby Richland box plant by transitioning employees to the modern operation. This greenfield project aims to lower structural costs, improve reliability and product quality in the Mid-South, and reinforce Rankin County’s role as a hub for advanced industrial and sustainable packaging activity. We’ll now...
